quest.story.chapter.cure.desc_1: The cure seemingly only §otreats§r the infection. It does nothing to prevent it.
quest.story.chapter.cure.desc_2: What remains in the ruined hospitals and polyclinics dwindles day by day.
quest.story.chapter.cure.desc_3: Without a means to make more, eventually, some day, it will run out.
quest.story.chapter.cure.desc_4: And if it does, the last hope of restoring civilization dies with it.
quest.story.chapter.cure.desc_5: Perhaps you've learned of this truth through hard-fought survival.
quest.story.chapter.cure.desc_6: Perhaps you simply wish to change the course of fate.
quest.story.chapter.cure.desc_7: §oAll you need is to rediscover the cure's method of manufacture.§r
quest.story.chapter.cure.subtitle: There has to be more, right?
quest.story.chapter.cure.title: Seeking the Cure
quest.story.chapter.tutorial.0348341AE70: Skill books provide a fixed amount of experience towards the skill, with higher tiers providing more experience.
They can be found in &eTier 2&r districts and onwards.
&o&7Be sure to check the loot tables for each building in the &6Districts&r &7chapter, once you have discovered them!&r&r

quest.story.chapter.tutorial.5A2CC575FC3: Use potatoes and cabbages to craft &bcabbage rolls&r in the stove.
Eating a wide variety of food will increase your maximum health, as well as provide other benefits, a list of which can be found in the &6Survival&r chapter.
&o&7A list of other cooking recipes can be found by typing &6@farmers &7into JEI.&r
quest.story.chapter.tutorial.desc_1: This questline provides a §brough guide§r to help you progress from the beginning of the game to a comfortable midgame.
quest.story.chapter.tutorial.desc_2: It will make references to many of the §6Guides§r in the section below —  take some time to check them out!§r
quest.story.chapter.tutorial.subtitle: Welcome to DeceasedCraft!
quest.story.chapter.tutorial.subtitle.de: If you've just started a new world, you will have §bone day§r of relative safety where no zombies will spawn.
Use it to familiarize yourself with the guidebook!
§cWARNING:§r While world generation will try to place you in the §bSuburb Residential District§r, §cthe district may still be too small to sucessfully survive in§r.
If that is the case, you may want to consider re-generating a new world.
quest.story.chapter.tutorial.title: The First Days
